description: User 1 (pn@getsally.io): Full campaign lifecycle — sequence generation, SmartLead push (DRAFT), test email, review, activation, reply monitoring auto-enabled. The CORE revenue flow.

steps.description: MCP asks which email accounts to use. User specifies eleonora accounts from 'petr' campaigns.
steps.user_prompt: Use the eleonora email accounts from the petr campaigns
user_prompt_variants: For email accounts, use eleonora's accounts from the campaigns with petr in name
Same email accounts as my petr campaigns — the eleonora ones
Email accounts: eleonora from petr campaigns

steps.description: Generate campaign sequence using best practices from project knowledge.
steps.user_prompt: Generate the email sequence for this campaign
user_prompt_variants: Build the email sequence based on our best practices
Generate sequence for the IT consulting targets

steps.description: User reviews the generated sequence and approves it.
user_prompt_variants: The sequence is fine, go ahead

steps.description: Push approved sequence + contacts to SmartLead as DRAFT campaign.
user_prompt_variants: Push to SmartLead with those email accounts
Let's create the campaign in SmartLead
steps.critical_requirement: Campaign MUST be DRAFT (not active). Test email MUST be sent to user. Settings must match reference campaign 3070919. Timing 9-18 in contact timezone.

steps.description: User checks inbox and confirms test email received.
steps.user_prompt: I got the test email, looks good
user_prompt_variants: Test email received, sequence looks great
Checked my inbox, email looks good
Got it, the test email is fine

steps.critical_requirement: After activation, reply monitoring MUST be ON by default. MCP should confirm monitoring is active.

steps.description: MCP confirms reply monitoring is active. If Telegram not connected, asks to connect.

db_checks: Campaign exists in SmartLead with status ACTIVE
Leads uploaded include segment + normalized company name
Test email log exists for this campaign
No test leads (pn@, services@) added to campaign since user IS test account — they ARE added

ui_checks.check: New campaign visible with ACTIVE status

smartlead_checks: Campaign exists in SmartLead API with correct name
Sequence has 3+ steps with proper subjects
Tracking: disabled (no open/click tracking per reference)
